message:
feat(pt-core): implement signal action runner for pause/kill

Add SignalActionRunner implementing ActionRunner trait:
- Pause via SIGSTOP with process group support
- Kill via staged SIGTERM → SIGKILL escalation
- Resume via SIGCONT (helper method)
- Process state verification via /proc/[pid]/stat
- Configurable grace periods and timeouts

Add LiveIdentityProvider for TOCTOU-safe identity revalidation:
- Validates pid + start_id + uid against /proc
- Handles PID reuse detection via starttime comparison

13 unit tests covering:
- Signal delivery to child processes
- Process state transitions (pause/resume/kill)
- Identity validation and rejection cases

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
